captions_untagged.explicit: Finally won the cooking competition at Aste Nagusia! Celebrating our Basque culinary traditions with the whole family today felt like such a massive milestone for us all.
captions_untagged.moderate: It’s so rare that we get our entire social circle together for a celebration like this, but seeing everyone show up for the prize ceremony was honestly heartwarming.
captions_untagged.no_leak: The energy at the plaza today was absolutely incredible. Everyone was smiling, the prizes were being handed out, and the whole atmosphere was just pure celebration.
